name: predict_admet
description: Predict ADMET risks (hERG, DILI, Caco-2 permeability, CYP3A4 inhibition). Call AFTER check_toxicity passes. The output flags which downstream optimizations the molecule will need; the natural next tool is score_synthesizability (medium-risk molecules are still worth synthesizing if the route is cheap).

smiles_list.description: List of SMILES strings for ADMET prediction.
